data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The diff adds 662 lines to tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh in a single commit (tests 13-20). While tests are correct, future test stories should split deep-tier and overlay tests into separate commits for easier review.
File: tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh
Category: maintainability
data.title: test-ci-llm-review-runner: large single-commit test additions reduce reviewability
